---
title: "Contact"
date: last-modified
toc: false
---

## Kaoru Kakinuma

Associate Professor  
Frontier Research Institute for Interdisciplinary Sciences (FRIS)  
Tohoku University  

[Access](https://www.fris.tohoku.ac.jp/en/about/access.html)

**Email**

[kaoru.kakinuma.a1@tohoku.ac.jp](mailto:kaoru.kakinuma.a1@tohoku.ac.jp)
